holdings.infoBox: ROPE is an equity ETF with a total of 54 individual holdings. The top holdings are Target stock at 5.95%, CVS Health at 5.73%, Simon Property Group at 5.43%, Philip Morris International at 5.38%, and ConocoPhillips at 5.31%.

overview.description: The Coastal Compass 100 ETF (ROPE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of high quality, dividend-paying equity securities while aiming to provide downside protection using cash. It selects 25-50 large-cap stocks and employs a trend-following approach. ROPE was launched on Dec 17, 2024 and is issued by Coastal.
